caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Rise
caribbean.paragraph: St. Thomas is experiencing 20 kt winds with a 63% rain probability and 4.7 ft wave heights, while Turks & Caicos is seeing similar conditions with 20 kt winds. I expect these winds and wave conditions to impact ship traffic in the Eastern Caribbean, particularly in ports like St. Thomas and Turks & Caicos, with less than 10% rain probability not being a factor in this region today.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Storm Hits Cadiz
mediterranean.paragraph: Cadiz is experiencing 100% rain probability with winds reaching 22 kt and wave heights of 7.8 ft, while Marseille has a less intense system with winds of 19 kt. The Western Mediterranean, particularly around Cadiz, will see the most significant impact from this system with the dominant swell direction coming from the WSW at a swell period of 14 s.
